query_summary: Ranked / windowed analysis for referrals: 19 output column(s) sourced from 12 base table(s) (REFERRAL, REFERRAL_BED_DAY, REFERRAL_HIST, REFERRAL_HISTORY, RFL_HX_ACT...). (+5 more filter clause(s)).
